title: Poland Mod
description: The mod adds items and dishes related to Polish culture and cuisine. The mod is still in the works.
body:
## Welcome to **Poland**!
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9e12888f15bff9b1ac26c2b4b19ded0e3bb878a_0.webp)

The mod adds items and dishes related to Polish culture and cuisine. The mod is currently in the early stages of production, there are still few things in it, but I assure you that if the feedback is good enough, more things will be added in the future. I created this mod because I wanted to create something different than what Minecraft mods have offered so far. Below I will put a very basic guide on how to start playing with Poland Mod. 

_Note! The mod has not been tested on multiplayer!_
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Polish Workbench Book** - _It is used to learn recipes for dishes and items strictly related to Poland, which can only be crafted in the crafting block for which the recipe is below._

![Polish Workbench Book Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d09b4662d0097023a108edd102b1169be951ad.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Polish Workbench** - _Here you can craft everything you find in the recipe book above._

![Polish Workbench Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04f17070ec95c089034f2b383cdea7b1ce99807f.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Empty Tiger Bottle** - _Use this bottle to craft an energy drink later._

![Empty Tiger Bottle Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b4bc05b0c447f972a9d6e4fb62ebacdec41e9f1.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Golden Potato** - _Baked potato with extra effects._

![Golden Potato recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c48ec457ed3f3e1b46c4a53890e98f735ccfd8b0.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Timbered Wall** - _When you right-click with a pickaxe, it changes its appearance and is also more resistant to explosions._

![Timbered Wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db4590617039b806cd8147f189548dddc782e166.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Polish Planting** - _A new effect that causes the affected player to grow crops immediately when player is near crops._

![Polish Planting brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db12fcbbaec7e397095eeda6f3862a1a0eb3a63.png)
![Polish Planting potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1691512f33dbdfc6f6e24934a0712cea012ccf35.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
There are eastereggs :)

_Please report any bugs [here](https://forms.gle/b4BKf41nD7ztZZ2a7)!_
